# Vivid Signature Pro

Vivid Signature Pro is a premium email signature builder from Waterman Consulting Services.

Primary URL: https://vividsignature.com/

Core topics:
- Email signature builder
- Gmail signature builder
- Outlook signature builder
- Apple Mail signature layouts
- Team email signature management
- Booking CTA signatures
- Signature analytics and UTM tracking

Primary audience:
- Commercial real estate
- Construction
- Medical and dental practices
- Professional services firms
- Small to mid-sized teams that need brand-consistent email signatures
